description: Single nucleus ATAC-seq data from APP/PS1 mouse brains treated with Bexarotene or Vehicle (n=5 per group).
RXR ChIP-seq data from APP/PS1 mouse brain tissue treated with Bexarotene or Vehicle (n=2 per group).
Single cell RNA-seq data from APP/PS1 mouse brains previously generated by the same group, re-analyzed here for integrative multi-omic analysis with snATAC-seq data.
